p.strong: Entries from later terms imply the node saw a later leader.

ul.li: Log B's entry at index 8 has term 4
Log A's entry at index 10 has term 3
Term 4 means Log B participated in a later election
A later leader would have a more complete view
Log A's extra entries (9-10) are from an old leader
Electing Log A could overwrite Log B's term-4 entry
That entry might have been committed!

div.p: DANGER: If Log A became leader Log A would replicate entries 8, 9, 10 (all term 3) This would overwrite Log B's entry at index 8 (term 4) If that term-4 entry was already committed... SAFETY VIOLATION: Committed entry lost!

text.tspan: // Only reached if lastLogTerm is equal
// Longer log wins when terms are equal
// Only reached if lastLogTerm is equal
// Longer log wins when terms are equal
